# Pdf Review And Edit Template

Copy this template into the relevant project note or working draft. Replace placeholders with repository-backed facts or user-provided context. Leave unknown values blank or mark them as `Unknown`; do not invent them.

```markdown
# PDF Review and Edit Plan — <Document Title>

## Review objective

## Source / page references

## Summary of findings

## Content corrections

| Page / section | Issue | Recommended edit | Reason |
|---|---|---|---|
|  |  |  |  |

## Formatting / export issues

## Sensitive-data or metadata concerns

## Revised source text

## Final PDF QA checklist
```
